channel.title: HoldLens — What to buy (Q4 2025)
channel.description: Top buy signals from the best portfolio managers in the world — ranked by HoldLens's multi-factor recommendation model. Updated every 13F filing deadline.

item.title: META buy signal — 100/100 · 9 managers buying
item.description: John Armitage, Li Lu, François Rochon, Andreas Halvorsen, Jeffrey Ubben, Chase Coleman, Stephen Mandel, Joel Greenblatt, Lee Ainslie are buying META (Meta Platforms) this quarter. Multi-factor recommendation score: 100/100. Quality-weighted buyer list: John Armitage (Q4.9), Li Lu (Q4.5), François Rochon (Q4.5), Andreas Halvorsen (Q4.2), Jeffrey Ubben (Q3.4), Chase Coleman (Q3.3), Stephen Mandel (Q2.5), Joel Greenblatt (Q2.2), Lee Ainslie (Q1).

item.title: NVDA buy signal — 68/100 · 3 managers buying
item.description: David Tepper, Tom Slater, Andreas Halvorsen are buying NVDA (NVIDIA) this quarter. Multi-factor recommendation score: 68/100. Quality-weighted buyer list: David Tepper (Q7.6), Tom Slater (Q4.8), Andreas Halvorsen (Q4.2).

item.title: UBER buy signal — 66/100 · 2 managers buying
item.description: David Tepper, Bill Ackman are buying UBER (Uber) this quarter. Multi-factor recommendation score: 66/100. Quality-weighted buyer list: David Tepper (Q7.6), Bill Ackman (Q5.1).

item.title: SCHW buy signal — 66/100 · 2 managers buying
item.description: John Armitage, Glenn Greenberg are buying SCHW (Charles Schwab) this quarter. Multi-factor recommendation score: 66/100. Quality-weighted buyer list: John Armitage (Q4.9), Glenn Greenberg (Q6.2).

item.title: MSFT buy signal — 64/100 · 3 managers buying
item.description: Terry Smith, John Armitage, Andreas Halvorsen are buying MSFT (Microsoft) this quarter. Multi-factor recommendation score: 64/100. Quality-weighted buyer list: Terry Smith (Q5.8), John Armitage (Q4.9), Andreas Halvorsen (Q4.2).

item.description: Prem Watsa, Warren Buffett are buying OXY (Occidental Petroleum) this quarter. Multi-factor recommendation score: 53/100. Quality-weighted buyer list: Prem Watsa (Q6.9), Warren Buffett (Q5.9).
